# PRSG-915 — Map of Content

Poison map: the BACKLINKS marker pair is intentionally UNBALANCED (a duplicated
START with no matching END), the FR-022 fail-safe case. A batch run over this root
must stop with exit 2 and leave every other map unmodified.
